message:
test(proptest): expand sharded_counter (18→31) property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

New properties: shard_count independence, reset-then-add, double reset
idempotent, max single value, max shard_count independence, fresh max
is zero, max reset-then-observe, gauge set-then-get_max, snapshot serde
deterministic, snapshot empty vecs round-trip, counter/max Debug formatting,
counter fresh is zero.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
